tasks.cardano:smoke:emulator: bash -c 'scripts/patch-libsodium-deno.sh && env CARDANO_BACKEND=emulator deno run --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read backend/cardano/smoke.ts'
tasks.cardano:license-smoke:emulator: bash -c 'scripts/patch-libsodium-deno.sh && env CARDANO_BACKEND=emulator deno run --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read backend/cardano/license_listing_smoke.ts'
tasks.serve:emulator: bash -c 'scripts/patch-libsodium-deno.sh && env CARDANO_BACKEND=emulator deno run --allow-net --allow-env --allow-read backend/api/main.ts'
